description: Configure the student information system with two new attendance status codes for the current school year using the administrator credentials (Username: 'admin', Password: 'Admin@123'). Create an attendance code titled 'Half Day' (Short Name: 'HD', Type: 'Official', State Code: 'HD', Default: No) and an attendance code titled 'Virtual Attendance' (Short Name: 'VA', Type: 'Official', State Code: 'VA', Default: No).
